popup.instanceDescription: Unique connection identifier for this browser

record.cardDesc: Record your actions for Agent reference
record.sectionHint: Generates a recording instruction — send it to your Agent to start recording your actions; the Agent can then use the recording to automate similar tasks.
record.promptTemplate:
Use BrowserSkill's `bsk` CLI to record the browser actions I'm about to demonstrate.

Steps:
1. Run: {{command}}
2. Once you confirm it's started, I'll operate in the opened window myself.
3. After I click Finish, read the returned trace.json and summarize the actions (pages + steps); don't re-run or "verify".

borrowConfirmation.title: Allow tab borrow?
borrowConfirmation.titleInactive: Agent wants to borrow a tab
borrowConfirmation.body: An AI agent wants to move this tab into its workspace. You can deny or allow the borrow.
borrowConfirmation.notificationTitle: BrowserSkill: Agent wants to borrow a tab
borrowConfirmation.notificationBody: Approve or deny the borrow of "{{tabTitle}}" in your browser.

helpRequest.title: Agent needs your help
helpRequest.compactStatus: Agent is still waiting for you to finish this step
helpRequest.noteLabel: Optional note back to the agent
helpRequest.notePlaceholder: Add a note for the agent (optional)
